entry.title: How to Avoid Plant Error During Billing Document Request Creation
entry.content:
Symptom

When you create a billing document request (BDR) for a released service contract in the Schedule Billing Document Request Creation app, an error message appears saying “Plant segment missing for material & in plant &”.

Service Contract Introduction

Then you would ask: How is Plant information used in a typical service contract through the end-to-end process of that contract?

Here is an overview.

Step 1: Create and Release a Service Contract via the SOAP API Service Contract - Create, Update (Asynchronous) or in the Manage Service Contracts App

Note: Pay attention to the Sale Organization in the following screenshot. We use 1710 as an example. Sales Organization belongs to a unique Company Code which has an attribute of Country in your configuration. This country information is relevant to plant assignment and is to be checked in Step2.

Step 2: Create a Billing Document Request via the Schedule Billing Document Request Creation App

Plant and material are checked in order to generate a BDR.

Step 3: Create an Invoice with the BDR via the Manage Billing Documents App.

Current Plant Determination and Material Checking Logic

  1. The system firstly gets the plant from that is assigned to the Service Employee and Country in your configuration
  2. If the system cannot find a plant from Step a, it tries to get a plant from that is assigned to Country in your configuration. Normally, a plant can be found in this step.
  3. After the plant is found, the system checks whether the material master data has been extended to the plant. If not, the system stops BDR creation and gives the error message “Plant segment missing for material& in plant&.” If yes, the system creates a BDR.

Configure Your Plant Assignment

a. Go to the Configuration Your Solution app and find the Employee Service Location item.

Although the recommended step is Assign Plant to Service Employee and Country, it is not necessary for service contracts.

b. Select Assign Plant to Country and assign your plant to the country same as the one in your company code.

c. If Step b is done, check the plant in the material SRV_01_PRODUCT, which is the product used in the service contract. Go to your Fiori Launchpad and use the Display Material feature of the Manage Product Master Data app. (You may need the role PRODMASTER_SPECIALIST for your user.)

The screenshot below shows the 1710 plant does not been extended for material SRV_01_PRODUCT. Problem is found!

Solution: Extend Material to Plant

We provide an example here to demonstrate the solution.

Extend the material SRV_01_PRODUCT to the plant 1710 in the Manage Product Master Data App

a. Search for the product

b. Go to the Plants tab and click the Create button

1710 is extended and you can find it in the list.

c. Now you can run the BDR create job again in the Schedule Billing Document Request Creation app and the BDR is created successfully.

entry.title: i need a Hana query stock ledger report for opening balance query and closing stock query insap b1
Re: What is the first item in the left hand-side navigati...
entry.content: 'Subaccounts' is the correct answer. It worked for me.

entry.title: Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP - risk-management-db-deployer crashing
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently doing the learning journey Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP and facing some issues with the app risk-management-db-deployer. I don't think I did anything different than the tutorial, yet this app is always crashing. 

Risk-management-db is bound to risk-management-db-deployer and risk-management-srv.

Any idea why it could be crashing? 
I've been redoing the entire tutorial but it is still crashing..

Thanks for your help!

Eloise

Hello Reader of This Blog,

The link for "this article" in the last paragraph is not working now. Please use this one:

How to Avoid Plant Error During Billing Document Request Creation 

Best,

Wei

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello  @David_Chaviano  

My name is Disha Raskar. I am a pre-final year computer engineering student from Pune, India. From what we hear in the news, the local job market in India is not doing great at this moment. To get employed, I need to upskill myself. SAP is extensively utilized across various industries, including finance, manufacturing, healthcare, retail, etc Proficiency in SAP would equip me with the skills necessary to navigate and excel in these sectors, thus broadening my employment opportunities and increasing my marketability to potential employers. Completing this certification would help me gain new skills and knowledge, validate my proficiency, and also demonstrate my commitment to learning in this domain. 

I'm the only daughter of my mother. And my mother being a single parent, we are facing some financial constraints, because of which I am not able to afford the expenses associated with attempting the SAP certification exam. 

However, I firmly believe, that the Digital Skills Initiative could be a great opportunity for me to upskills myself inspite of the financial barrier. This certification would help me start my career journey with rewarding opportunities. 

 

Thanking you

Disha Raskar

please help!!

entry.title: Re: Kicking Off College Football with Analytics
entry.content: Thanks for sharing this detailed information along with proper graphs. I'll share this info in the blog section of my flag uniform site.

entry.title: Client's requirements is to calculate commissions in real-time.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a client requirement to calculate commissions in real-time. Here's the scenario: each time a credit is generated from the source system, the sales data flows into the SF Incentive Management system. Once it's there, a pipeline run should be triggered immediately, and this process generates payout files from the Incentive Management system.

Now, typically the leaf level of the calendar is the day. However, in my specific scenario, I need to run multiple payouts within each day. This means that instead of processing commissions just once per day, I'll need to do it several times throughout the day whenever there's a credit.

Is this feasible and technically possible? Please also highlight any potential drawbacks or limitations associated with it.

Your expert opinion on this matter would be immensely valuable.

entry.title: Re: Verification of information about users.
entry.content:
Okay, so it's really for administrators, without using transaction codes.

Hyperlink: 2379567 - Using Unified Auditing with SAP NetWeaver - SAP for Me

entry.title: Update model unassigned using dimension properties
entry.content:
Hi

There has been a requirement to add a new public dimension (Profit Centre) to a model.  I would like to now populate this dimension field using the existing dimensions in the model and the properties of this public dimension.

Please see the example below, highlighting the result I am after.

Can someone please explain how to do with a Data Action?  Or is there possibly another way?

 

Thanks

Anton

entry.title: Re: How to Delete Cloud Subaccount
entry.content: I would add that if you delete the SAP Cloud ALM subaccount any work that has been done will be lost and cannot be restored. So ensure you understand this fully before taking this action.

entry.title: SSAM 2310 - Auto-Sync is not being triggered upon connection changes
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
We are in the process of implementing SSAM2310, where we have a requirement to activate Auto-Sync upon Auto-Save parameter for status change.

We tried with Start ,Hold and Complete Statuses. Hold is Working as Expected. Similarly, we're trying it for Start and Complete but its not working as expected.

Could please guide me on the Auto-Save functionality at the started and complete statuses?

Thanks and Regards,
Deepika.

I think the Digital Skills Initiative of SAP is a great opportunity to help people like me change career paths.

I already started the learning journey "Discovering SAP Activate - Implementation Tools and Methodology", and an invitation to the initiative to continue my learning would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards

Simon

entry.title: Re: CAP subscribe to multiple channel with SAP Event Mesh client
entry.content: @david_kunz2 How does the emit message to topic work here? we tried const messaging: any = await cds.connect.to("messaging"); messaging.emit(topic, message, context); When above code is ran not able to see the message in the queue (same topic is subscribed in the queue)

entry.title: Re: Call browser based on ABAP RAP Action
entry.content:
@abdul_hakim 

Instead of using actions, how about specifying the @UI.v1.DataFieldWithUrl annotation in the LineItem?

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/d782acf8bfd74107ad6a04f0361c5f62.html

ABAP CDS example:

@UI.<lineItem/fieldGroup>: [{ type: #WITH_URL, url: 'URL' }]
URL;

entry.title: Re: UDP on Kyma Environment
entry.content:
The testing cluster that I am using utilizes AWS, which judging from this post should allow for a UDP LoadBalancer.

Since Kyma already uses Istio for its IngressController, I don't think I can use the nginx-ingress without extensively modifying the cluster.

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Associate – Process Data Analyst - SAP...

entry.title: Adding a Text field to an ABAP CDS View via extension.
entry.content:
Hello experts,

There is a standard CDS view we would like to extend by adding a text field. We want to add a Material_Text field, which will contain the text of the existing field Material. Material would then have the annotation sap:text='Material_Text' in the OData metadata. We already have a text view properly setup.

If we were creating the view from scratch, it would be simple. We would just need to use: 

 

{
   ...
   @ObjectModel.text.association: '_Text'
   matnr as Material,
   _Text
}

 

But since we are trying to extend an existing view via, the code below fails:

 

extend view C_ConsumerView with ZC_CONSUMER
  association [0..*] to I_MaterialText as _MaterialText on  $projection.Material3  = _MaterialText.Material

{
  @ObjectModel.text.association: '_MaterialText'
  Material,
  _MaterialText
}

 

as we get the "The name Material is not unique" error, as it tries to add a field that already exists. @ObjectModel.text.association or sap:text also not available via metadata extension

So what would be the correct way to approach this?

Best regards,
André

entry.title: SAP CodeJam HANA ML In Switzerland 2024-03 Recap
entry.content:
Last Saturday we had the Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python in Lausanne and Zurich, Switzerland kindly hosted by SAP and co-organized by @AndreasForster.

This font on the wall in SAP Lausanne brought some nostalgia for an old-timer like me.

 It is always good to meet and exchange ideas with @jakobflaman!

SAP Stammtisch in Zurich, kindly organized by @StephanHeinberg 🍻 

SAP CodeJam in Zurich the following day: what better room name it could be if not the "Jupiter"??

Thanks to @AndreasForster for all the effort he put into making this SAP CodeJams happen!

Thanks as well to @nicowyss for all the help as well!

SAP CodeJams connect people in the community, who sometimes have not seen each other for years, like @AGR and @_Satish_ 

If you want to host the SAP CodeJam on this topic, then please check: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/quot-getting-started-with-machine-learning-using-sap-hana-quot-as-a-new-sap/ba-p/13574098

entry.title: Re: SAP Build process automation live content - maintaini...
entry.content:
You can have maximum of 10 versions of a Rules project at a time. You have to delete some of the old versions when your number of versions go beyond.

You can create up to ten different versions of your project. from documentation

entry.title: How to do grouping in sap.ui.table which has duplicate row values
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have done grouping for sap.m.table. Now, I want to do grouping on sap.ui.table to merge duplicate row values. which should look like this.

and this is the code I have done in xml file so what needs to be done to group suppliers.

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
	xmlns="sap.ui.table"
	xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
	xmlns:u="sap.ui.unified"
	xmlns:c="sap.ui.core"
	xmlns:m="sap.m">
	<Table rows="{TTGRFQDetailModel>/DetailHeader/toSuppBidDetail/results}"   selectionMode="None">
		<columns>
			<Column width="11rem" grouped="true" > 
				<m:Label text="{i18n>supplier}" />
				<template>
					<m:Text text="{TTGRFQDetailModel>SupplierName}" wrapping="false" />
				</template>
			</Column>
			<Column width="11rem">
				<m:Label text="{i18n>Round_No}" />
				<template>
					<m:Text text="{path:'TTGRFQDetailModel>RoundDocumentNo',formatter:'.formatter.RoundFormatter'}" wrapping="false" />
				</template>
			</Column>

		</columns>
	</Table>

</core:FragmentDefinition>

entry.title: Deallocation of production orders in APO-PP/DS due to reread mater data action in ECC
entry.content:
We don't want the production order become deallocated in APO-PP/DS after below action in ECP and need your guidance and help for this situation. Thank you..

The steps are:

  1. I enter CO02 with a production order
  2. For the production order, I choose Functions>>Read PP Master Data which is a standart function
  3. After Read PP Master Data run for the production order, I check the production order in SCM-APO-PP/DS system.
  4. In SCM-APO-PP/DS system the order status becomes deallocated due to Read PP Master Data action in ECC system. There is CIF integration between ECP and SCP.

 

Thank You very much..

entry.content: Thank You!

entry.title: CAP open type support on oData node.js
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

According to the documentation here it is supposed the usage of the open types is allowed on oData service on CAP application.

I'm implementing a project where I'm serving a SAP ariba open API data as oData, as the result structure contains hundred of fields I used the @open annotation to serve it dynamically:

I can see in the metadata of the EDMX the entity contains the OpenType property:

On service level I'm returning the following payload:

But I'm getting just the static properties:

 

So, do you know if the functionality is supported?

This is the CDS version I'm using:

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Customizing of GOS (Generic Object Service) working f...
entry.content: @benoit-schmid FYI your comment is truncated.

entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud: Be Smart, Be Optimized, Be green
entry.content:
Introduction

2024 is the breaking year where world wide economic is entering in new phase. Growth decreases, some ressources limits are reached (and more are coming), and population is aging.

How those facts will be translated in IT and eCommerce ? How business can be made in this context ?

This article is a proposition to answer those questions or at least to see new trends coming.

 

Growth

Less volume is often synonym to less profit. And less profit forces us to find a way to optimise or to re-think how we do business. 

A simple and short term answer is to increase price to compensate volumes reduction sold. Under specific circonstance, It what we saw with global inflation in 2023. But higher price is an accelerator of economic shrinking. And it is an endless deadly loop.

Other solution is to embrace this volume selling reduction by reviewing your internal business process. This can be executed by simplifying how business has been made and be more flexible to volume selling fluctuation. 

For your SAP Commerce solution, it can be translated by seeking how business can be run in standard features. Less customization allows you to adopte sooner the new roadmap features/optimized releases and be less depends on IT internal expert division.

Let take a concrete example, SAP Commerce introduces Adaptive Search which a way to personalize the search result by user group/segment. If your IT division did a deep customization in search engine, it becomes harder to plug this standard feature. And then, by frustration, you might be tempted by integrating a external search engine to get this capacity. 

Deviate from standard, in economic context where profit can fluctuate a lot, could not be a good idea.

 

Aging

Population is aging. And with that, classic eCommerce journey is changing. People is seeking quality and simplification. Fancy promotion banner, complex user journey, long response time, and popup screens everywhere are probably the best way to lose your users.

Aging population needs to be consolidated in smooth and standardized interface. And SAP Commerce provides a simple, fast and clean interface with Composable Storefront module / B2C demo website.

In short, your internal business complexity should be hidden as much as possible to your end user. For example, this can be achieved by doing some comprises regarding how stocks and prices are handled internally.

 

Resource limitation

Resource limitation means that hardware will become more and more expensive. And software optimization should be sought after in order to keep running your business.

Physical resource exhaustion is not the only motivation factor here, we will have also more and more sustainable objectives to respect. Your business must be less impacting or more green.

This point is echoing to the simplification and standardisation. Less complexity is easer to compute and to scale.

Infrastructure rationalisation usage is also a great opportunity to optimisation your solution. And it can be done through : data cleaning, CPU usage reduction, Memory usage reduction, sizing allocated assessment, nominal/peak period analysis, and so on.  

 

Conclusion

By his global position, SAP is known better than other company how this economic change can be handled. Our solutions take these factors into account to anticipate needs while including the optimizations necessary for the proper execution of complex business rules.

SAP Expert Services can help you taking the right decision for your business and to assist you for maintaining in good shape your current SAP solution.

entry.title: Re: Java Mapping Exception in SAP PI 7.31
entry.content: Hii Lukasz

entry.title: Re: Java Mapping Exception in SAP PI 7.31
entry.content: I am facing the same issue could please help me. Where can I found the runtime & what to do ?

entry.title: Re: Issue while Inspection Results Recording in DMC
entry.content:
Hi,
Check if you set 'Single result' at 'Control Indicators' tab of each characteristic in the routing.
Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: how to disable Export to Excel from each Widget from...
entry.content:
Hi,

Select the widget, go to styling quick menu section and uncheck the export checkbox

entry.title: Re: Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP - risk-management-db-deployer crashing
entry.content:
Have a look at the logs of the application.  That will give you a clue,

if you are using trial, be aware that HANA is shutdown every day. You have to start HANA again.

entry.title: Re: Can SAP.GETDATA and SAP.SETDATA be used with the measure model?
entry.content:
@SP9 

Both SAP.GETDATA and SAP.SETDATA work fine with Measure Based Model. You will need to specify the Measure you want to read or write.

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam HANA ML In Switzerland 2024-03 Recap

Whether it's writing Python code using BAS, networking with fellow SAP practitioners or coincidentally bumping into an old colleagues after a decade!! What more can you wish for in a day? Can't thank enough  @Vitaliy-R, @AndreasForster, @nicowyss and the rest of the team.

entry.title: Re: How to convert warning message MM072 into error message

entry.title: Destination file error. [CrystalEnterprise.DiskUnmanaged]: [] when scheduling reports to File System
entry.content:
Hi, 

After doing a patch from version 4.2 Support Pack 9 Patch 6 to 4.2 Support Pack 9 Patch 16 we are not able to deliver schedule report to a file system. We have follow this guide: 2477817 - Error "CrystalEnterprise.DiskUnmanaged" when scheduling a report to file system after upgrade to 4.2 SP09 Patch 1100, 4.3 SP02 Patch 800, 4.3 SP03 - SAP for Me but it still doesn't work. We get this error message "destination file error. []: [CrystalEnterprise.DiskUnmanaged]". Does anyone else have the same problem and have any solution for this?

entry.title: Re: Calculate Measured based dimeson in SAC Analytical Ap...
entry.content:
@darshansavani 

Another way could be to make the relevant row 0  ( multiply by 0) when Inverse % less than 1 %. Zero suppression will remove the row .

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Where can I learn what an SAP System Administrator does?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Exploring the Role of an System Administrator learning journey 

Overview
In this course you will explore the role of an SAP system administrator by learning about many of their responsibilities and the skills needed to successfully manage an SAP system.

Learning objectives
The objective of this course is to provide the learner with an introduction to the role of an SAP System Administrator.  The learner will gain an understanding of the typical tasks performed by a system administrator across various SAP systems.  Users will also gain an understanding of how this role varies by product. 

Upon completion of this learning journey, learners will be able to decide if this role is right for them and follow the appropriate learning path to gain the necessary expertise.


Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: How to convert warning message MM072 into error message
entry.content: I can find SE84. Is it enough if I just change it from API_MAT_READ_ALL_PLM?

entry.title: Sap object class cannot be assigned to package in eclipse SAP BTP Trial
entry.content:
I have a SAP BTP trial for 90 days.  I use Eclipse. I'v already created few cleasses that works not bad.

But since past few weeks when i'm trying to creat new abap class and assign it to a package, I get the following  error:

SAP object CLAS <my_class_name>  CANNOT BE ASSIGNED TO PACKAGE ZD..........

I tryed many different packages .

Anybody knows how to fix it ?

entry.title: Re: Mapping of bank statement transaction codes is not wo...
entry.content:
Hello Kostadin,

 

have you mapped the external transaction code "TAM" to Payment Processing - Of Outgoing Bank Fees? ( Not fully visible in screenshot )

Also can you check if the payment direction is matching i.e it's debit/credit or decrease/increase accordingly also in the payment file?

 

Regards,

Harshal

Abdelmalek

entry.title: Re: CAP open type support on oData node.js
entry.content:
This is not supported by nodejs runtime yet, try Java runtime. 

If you scroll down a little bit in the documentation, there is a warning:

WARNING

The full support of Open Types (@open) in OData is currently available for the Java Runtime only. The Node.js runtime supports the feature only for the REST Adapter.

entry.title: Mass change of WBS Element has changes user status as well
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I've used TCODE CNMASSSTATUS in order to change WBS elements system status to Released.

It has worked, however it has changed the user status as well.

Is that a standard behavior?

How may I find the wat it happened?

 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Not all functions in CMC are working after patching
entry.content:
Hi, 

After doing a patch from version 4.2 Support Pack 9 Patch 6 to 4.2 Support Pack 9 Patch 16 we noticed that some days after the patching some functions stopped working. We did a validations on all functions right after the patching and all tests passed. But 2-3 days after we could not reach some functions i CMC, the functions that we could not reach are:

License Keys
Sets
Universes
Connections
BI Administrative Console
Web Service Query
OLAP Connections
Authorized HTML Elements
User Attribute Management
Promotion Management
Version Management
BI Administrators Cockpit
Visual Difference
Auditing
Monitoring
Multitenancy
Cryptographic Keys
Recycle Bin

We get the error message "didn't send any data". Does anyone else had this problem? Or have any suggestion on how to solve this? We have verified that the ports are right and open and that no firewall blocking.

entry.title: Re: Error "FAIL: process disp+work Dispatcher not running" when running docker image
entry.content:
I am experiencing this issue very recent as it used to work quite will since last 8  months.I am using windows 11 with 32GB RAM. Recently I reinstalled the latest version 1909_SP01 and I have all the licenses valid.

Any suggestions?

- Thanks.

entry.content: I am using a trial indeed, but my HANA Database Instance is running..

entry.title: After Hana upgrade Smart Filter Bar Mandatory filter fields are taking first value for invalid input
entry.content:
After hana upgrade in version 1.108.24 smart filter bar Mandatory filter fields when we enter the input manually or if we provide the invalid input it is not validating the values and not returning the error state to filter field. Instead of that it is picking the first value from the f4 help pop up. Which is incorrect result for the user operation.

 

Before the hana upgrade it was working fine.

Thanks and Regards,

VK

entry.title: Re: TreeView Table oData v4 doesn't display as a Tree, wh...
entry.content:
Hi Francesca,
sorry for the delay in replying. 

If you are implementing the treeview based on the documentation you posted, this only works for displaying the tree view in a List Report. This means the CDS view of the treeview is the entry point of your service.

To display Treeview in an object page, I'm still checking internally and will update here again when I get more information.

Regards,
Jessie

entry.title: Re: Error While Updating Receipt from Production in SAP B...
entry.content:
Hi dinesh_s1,

This issue might be due to some database corruption.

If you want to get it investigated, kindly create an incident for SAP Business One Support Team under the component SBO-SDK-DI.

Kindly mention the link of this discussion while creating the incident.

Kind regards,

Shalini Singhal

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: AATP BOP FIRST COME FIRST SERVE SCENARIO
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I was searching for BOP first come first serve scenario in AATP. In SAP help portal I got this scenario but here I have some doubts. Can we run the BOP based on sorting order based on creation date and time by giving selection sort condition? Below is SAP help portal example for BOP first come first serve. In below example it is not clear this sorting based on creation date or requested delivery date? And when stock is same before and after BOP then why for 1st order not confirmed with full confirmation as when in system we create order, it confirm first in first out itself. 

As per my understanding we can sort the orders based on RDD date not creation date as whenever we create order it automatically confirm based on first come first rule

entry.title: Re: SAP Gateway Project Extn/Redefinition - Issue with call to extension
entry.content: Any updates please

entry.title: Re: Clean code checks for ABAP – Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Yes, the new Code pal for Cloud can also be used in 2023 on-premise Release. 

Regards.

Thomas.

entry.title: SAP GTM-Error occured in Profit Simulation
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have created a Trading Contract (Two-sided) Stock Shipment. As I am new to the GTM processes, there are certain things still would be challenging for me.

Request your help on the below at the earliest to proceed further with my testing.

1. The status overview log:

Would like to know how to complete the missing information in Finance document.

2. Error while doing Profit simulation:

I am not sure, if I missed anything to complete the profile simulation in the SPRO.

Apart from the above, I have inputted the minimal level of data in the Contract. If anything, I missed

to complete the scenario (since I am very new to GTM, trying to understand the functionality now) kindly assist me to meet the E2E flow of the testing.

Highly appreciate your help on this.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Vijay Arumugam

entry.title: Re: Issue while Inspection Results Recording in DMC
entry.content: Hi ManoelCosta

entry.title: Re: Issue while Inspection Results Recording in DMC
entry.content: Hi ManoelCosta, The indicator was already checked and set to Single result in control indicator for that routing. But then also same issue.

entry.title: Re: What's your favorite tip for using SAP Build Apps?
entry.content: So here is another useful idea, that might be obvious for others, but I stumbled across just recently. When you want to move or deleted or copy multiple logic nodes at the same time, you either have to use the mouse to select an area, or click through the logic nodes with 'ctrl + mouse left click' (or cmd), but if you want to select all of the flows that are connected one specific flow just do this: 'shift + mouse left click' it will select all the nodes that are connected as here:

entry.title: Re: EML to create Sales Order not working
entry.content: Hi @Oleg_Vokh, Thank you for your assistance helping me. Do you have any idea how can I get the created sales order number before the execution finishes? We need to store it, but since the commit is internally handled by framework, I cannot find a way to capture it.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to our SAP Learning Group moderated by SAP Learning Experts
entry.content:
Hi @mamallick 
Thank you for joining our SAP Learning Group. 
Please ask a question in the Q&A area.
This makes it  easier to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses

Would you mind to repost it?

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors - Custom Navigation URL Token
entry.content:
Hello @gerald_reinhard @siddharthrajora ,

I was able to create the custom navigation URL & was able to add the dynamic parameter/token @USER_ID@ to the URL via Configure Custom Navigation and so when I tested the URL the token "@USER_ID@" was replaced by real User ID of logged in user as per mentioned in guide https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/727f7d55535c41dbafffc73785ed53fa/3e7f007b32754f3db37775505ed914d3.html

However, I would like to check if I could place this same custom URL with @USER_ID@ token on home page card and if the token "@USER_ID@" can be replaced by real User ID of logged in user when employee clicks on this link/URL from home page card. From what I have noticed is on home page card, you can embed the deep link of SF that can redirect to any page within SF but you can't configure the custom URL with dynamic parameters whose value will be resolved in runtime (ex: when someone clicks on the link). Can you please confirm the same whether the same config is possible on home page card or not?

 

Thanks,

Jigyasa

entry.title: Re: Inventory Stock Reversal in SAP: Best Practices for O...
entry.content: @kenjon You can refer SAP Note 722980 for Creating Customer Incidents in SAP Business One.

entry.title: Re: CAP open type support on oData node.js
entry.content: Thank you, I missed that one. Is there any alternative that avoid me to define every possible field in the type?

entry.title: Re: Automate Invoice scanning - Serverless Computing
entry.content: what if i  want to achieve this same thing with Process automation will it work ?

entry.title: Re: Charting on Print-Time Formulas or shared variables a...
entry.content: Thank you Jamie for responding but I don not follow how to make this work.

entry.title: How do I efficiently update a lot of entities at once?
entry.content:
I connect to the SAP service layer via Nestjs.

In the SAP software I have created User Defined Fields for the IncomingPayment entity and A/R Invoice entity.

There are already a ton of entities created and all of them have their UDF value set to null.

I decided to programmatically set them using Nestjs with a for loop.

 

So what I do is fetch /IncomingPayments (GET Request) and I set the 'Prefer' header to 'odata.maxpagesize=30000'. This way I ensure all of the Incoming Payments ever created are fetched.

I ensure only the DocEntry and PaymentInvoices properties are selected.

Using a for loop, I loop over all of the fetched entities and I then do a PATCH request to /IncomingPayments(i) where i is the current incomingpayment being looped over. By accessing the first element of PaymentInvoices (PaymentInvoices[0]) and then getting it's DocEntry property (PaymentInvoices[0].DocEntry), I get the A/R Invoice Docentry that the current incoming payment is based on.

In the patch request body I have this:

{
 "U_invoice_id": invoiceId,
}

This is the approach I use to update each incoming payment.

But, I noticed not all of them are getting updated when I use this method.

I thought the Prefer header was the cause of that so I reduced it to 1000 instead of 30000.

But that still doesn't update all incoming payments. Some are skipped and I need to run the service multiple times to update all of them.

Is there a more efficient way to do this??

Maybe in SAP itself.

Using a Script?

Help

entry.title: Re: Charting on Print-Time Formulas or shared variables a...
entry.content: This is a vey difficult way to explain, the shared variable is a calculated field in a subreport. Not a field in a table.

entry.title: Re: I don´t need import request again in Urgent Changes
entry.content:
Hello Dolores,

Than you for your reply

I have changed the variant as you told me

Now we have the following behavior in the Emergency Changes:

- The transport to Quality System is OK with only one transport

- The transport to Production System still continue with both transports (request is ready to transport again)

Do you now why is the reason for it?

Thank you in advanced

Kind Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Recommended tool to transform SQL to XML.
entry.content:
Plain text SQL? I do not think so.
But you could generate plain text SQL from XML with external tool like: https://redata.dev/smartxml/docs/how-to-parse-xml-into-sql-or-json.html

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report / PrintOutputController.ModifyPrinterN...
entry.content: Added the cs file...

entry.title: Re: Run Crystal Report from Visual Studio
entry.content:
The server name looks odd.

Use the same connection info you use in Crystal Reports when connecting.

Try hard coding the log on info and see if that works

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: @oscar_ips hola, I am not fluent in Spanish and want to greet you in the community. It sounds like you have great experience with SAP customers on a great product. Have you joined this Barcelona - SAP Community group? Best of luck.

entry.title: BOBJ/BODS Created a new db/repository; load from another db/repository; new points to old ASE db
entry.content:
Created a new db/repository in a separate ASE instance; loaded from another db/repository from another ASE instance. Deleted info in AL_MACHINE_INFO but customer is getting the following error after registering the new repository and connecting to it. Does the customer need to following SAP 1481432? Is there an easier wa for the DBA to create and perform a dump/load? Is there another table which needs to be modified?

“ERROR: Sybase SQL Server <HECSAPDO101> error message for

operation <ct_results>: <Sybase Server message number

<911> State <2> Severity <11> From Server

<HECSAPDO101>: Message Text is: Attempt to locate entry in

sysdatabases for database ‘Repo_LOCAL_SBX_BI’ by name failed

- no entry found under that name. Make sure that name is

entered properly.”

entry.title: Re: What's your favorite tip for using SAP Build Apps?
entry.content: Love it!!!!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS1: TM master data based Sales Order Scheduling
entry.content:
Hi Wolfgang,

This is surely another interesting scenario. But in FPS1 this is not yet supported, unfortunately. We never tested it so far and it might well be there are still some technical restrictions from the way where the new TRS profile is maintained and selected in customizing.

But the story continues and if you know the roadmap you'll see that we keep working on this solution. And your point is definitely known to us as useful scenario.

Best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG: merge or transfer data between two vendors i...
entry.content: Please check the SAP Help Portal documentation about consolidation with MDG (documentation relates to the S/4HANA version).

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below categories:

    • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
    • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
    • First generation college students
    • Women

I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification.

entry.title: Re: Enhanced Error Handling within SAP Digital Manufacturing Production Processes
entry.content:
Hi @scb-schozs,
Once an errorCatch is thrown, only the service inputs and errorCode are indeed available, as depending on things like the error and the service itself, there is no guarantee that a proper response body structure is available at all. 

Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: SAP Build IRPA not recognize screen on virtual machine
entry.content: Try using WAIT with a delay of 5000 ms instead of using Wait(Screen), and test it in unattended mode.

entry.title: Re: Append files from 2 different sources using sap cloud...
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes we can archive through the CPI by using the poll enrich. 

you can refer this link :- https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/cloud-integration-use-poll-enrich-with-sftp-adapter/ba-p/13518650

entry.title: Re: Nomination error..
entry.content: I am getting Error "Material Does not exist for this transport System" while adding material in O4TU please help

entry.title: Equipment External number Ranges-Issue
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am facing an issue with Equipment External number Range. 

We wanted to retain the Business's existing Equipment number from their legacy system, so we suggested to have an external number range with a country specific prefix.

Example from Legacy system: CV001

Proposed Solution

Country 1 : S-CV001

Country 2 : P-CV001

Country 3 : A-CV001

The external number range which we have maintained is A0000 to Z9999

It worked for Country 1 and 2, but when we are implementing for country 3, we are getting an error : The Equipment number A-CV001 is not in external number range interval.

Can you please let me know why the system is not allowing for the 3rd case? How to rectify the issue or please suggest a work around?

Regards,

SK

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

entry.title: Re: Order siblings in a Hierarchy with Directory with SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Sefan,

Very helpful! Was looking for a way to do this without needing to name the node names in sequence in S/4.

Works a charm!

Thanks,

Chris

entry.title: Re: Inventory Stock Reversal in SAP: Best Practices for O...
entry.content: @Shalini_Singhal Can you provide me with the link please where do I find SAP note 722980 ??

entry.title: Re: All BITs are not generating for subscriber mapping ta...
entry.content:
Hello,

in this case you can use Allowances and set one allowance per item. Each allowance will be in charge to generate its own BIT. This is the most configurable feature of SAP CC. 

Best regards

Eric F.

entry.title: Re: Application Job parameters do not refresh
entry.content: Hello, a refresh button will be available next release. Currently, for such changes the object must be deleted and created again.

entry.title: Re: 🇨🇭 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Zurich, CH)
entry.content:
Hi Witalij,

Many thanks to You @Vitaliy-R, and the team from SAP Switzerland @AndreasForster @nicowyss. 

It was really fantastic event, very practical, rich, inspiring and energetic content and perfectly organized event as always. Based on this event I have had the possibility to gain in a very short period of time very clear understanding how to apply SAP HANA ml in real end to end business use cases.

It was really great to meet you on side in Zurich and I'm looking forward to meet you all again during the next events.

Thanks a lot and Best Regards,

Kris.
